content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?
RISK-ON: Normal volatility (Vol: 28.9%) with broad participation (Breadth: 6/8 sectors positive). Market tone favors cyclicals and risk assets.

2. Which sectors are leading?
Holding & Investment leading: DOHOL (1W: +10.92% | 1M: +2.57%) ABOVE TREND and SAHOL (1W: +4.02% | 1M: -9.29%) RECOVERY. Construction & REIT and Heavy Industry also outperform: TKFEN (1W: +16.25% | 1M: -4.73%) RECOVERY; KRDMD (1W: +6.43% | 1M: +4.11%) ABOVE TREND.

3. Which sectors are lagging?
Retail & Food and Technology & Telecom lag: MGROS (1W: -4.59% | 1M: -10.07%) BELOW TREND; TCELL (1W: -1.59% | 1M: -4.70%) BELOW TREND. These defensive/consumer names are under pressure despite broader rally.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?
TKFEN (1W: +16.25% | 1M: -4.73%) RECOVERY; DOHOL (1W: +10.92% | 1M: +2.57%) ABOVE TREND; HALKB (1W: +8.60% | 1M: +9.18%) ABOVE TREND; CCOLA (1W: +8.05% | 1M: -5.83%) RECOVERY; KRDMD (1W: +6.43% | 1M: +4.11%) ABOVE TREND.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?
PETKM (1W: -7.21% | 1M: -5.13%) BELOW TREND; SOKM (1W: -6.24% | 1M: -9.71%) BELOW TREND; AEFES (1W: -5.23% | 1M: -14.49%) BELOW TREND; MGROS (1W: -4.59% | 1M: -10.07%) BELOW TREND; TTKOM (1W: -3.75% | 1M: -8.54%) BELOW TREND.

6. Momentum Stocks?
High 1W momentum concentrated in TKFEN (1W: +16.25% | 1M: -4.73%) RECOVERY, DOHOL (1W: +10.92% | 1M: +2.57%) ABOVE TREND, HALKB (1W: +8.60% | 1M: +9.18%) ABOVE TREND, CCOLA (1W: +8.05% | 1M: -5.83%) RECOVERY, TUPRS (1W: +5.53% | 1M: +12.83%) ABOVE TREND.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?
Mixed but improving: HALKB (1W: +8.60% | 1M: +9.18%) ABOVE TREND is the clear leader while AKBNK (1W: -2.28% | 1M: -9.77%) BELOW TREND and ISCTR (1W: -0.54% | 1M: -13.13%) BELOW TREND lag, signaling selective exposure within the sector.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?
Heavy industry showing strength led by KRDMD (1W: +6.43% | 1M: +4.11%) ABOVE TREND and ASELS (1W: +3.72% | 1M: +14.47%) ABOVE TREND; construction names are mixed with TKFEN (1W: +16.25% | 1M: -4.73%) RECOVERY and ALARK (1W: -1.79% | 1M: -15.69%) BELOW TREND.

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?
Energy is constructive: TUPRS (1W: +5.53% | 1M: +12.83%) ABOVE TREND and TRALT (1W: +4.92% | 1M: +14.60%) ABOVE TREND lead, while PETKM (1W: -7.21% | 1M: -5.13%) BELOW TREND signals dispersion and stock-specific risk.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?
Risk-on stance: overweight cyclical/leverage-to-growth names (Energy, Heavy Industry, selective Holding & Investment) and trim exposure to weak Retail and Telecom names; keep bank exposure selective toward HALKB and recovering names.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?
TKFEN (1W: +16.25% | 1M: -4.73%) RECOVERY on follow-through risk; TUPRS (1W: +5.53% | 1M: +12.83%) ABOVE TREND on commodity flow and refining margins; DOHOL (1W: +10.92% | 1M: +2.57%) ABOVE TREND for holding re-rates; PETKM (1W: -7.21% | 1M: -5.13%) BELOW TREND for mean-reversion or further downside.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?
Holding & Investment and Energy & Chemicals for leadership continuity; Retail & Food to monitor for continued weakness and downside risk.

13. Key Levels & Triggers?
Watch XU100 reaction to recent swing high and local support (monitor break/hold of the last 1-2 week range for confirmation); near-term catalysts: global risk sentiment, commodity prices (oil), local macro print or policy commentary and company-specific earnings/announcements.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
Risk-on market with normal volatility and broad sector participation (Vol: 28.9%; Breadth: 6/8). Favor cyclical and energy-linked names (TUPRS, KRDMD, DOHOL) while trimming weak consumer and telecom positions (MGROS, SOKM, TCELL) as dispersion widens.
